purpose: Track human-reader format artifact review separately from generated-reader chapter-text review and separately from edition release records, including the approved generated-reader HTML row and the current blocked curated-reader candidate.

current_curated_candidate.scope: Tracked curated reader manuscript rendered into ignored local HTML, EPUB, DOCX, and PDF review artifacts, plus e-reader and audio release-preparation lanes.

records.artifact_scope: Local ignored curated reader HTML snapshot under build/curated_reader_edition/format_artifacts/html/_reader_site.
records.notes: The curated reader HTML snapshot rendered locally, passed the strict browser viability sweep across 98 page-view pairs, passed the automated keyboard traversal review across 98 page-view pairs, passed the accessibility-tree release-preparation probe across 98 page-view pairs with 0 unnamed interactive elements and 0 duplicate-ID hits, and is covered by the final figure-artifact review. It is a release-preparation artifact, not the 2026-06-29 generated reader HTML approval.
non_claims: This candidate row does not approve curated reader HTML for release.
This candidate row does not publish the ignored local HTML artifact.
This candidate row does not promote any claim support state.

records.artifact_scope: Local ignored curated reader EPUB snapshot under build/curated_reader_edition/format_artifacts/epub/_reader_site/The-ASI-Stack.epub.
records.notes: The curated EPUB snapshot rendered locally, passed repaired-package content and internal-link checks, passed XML parse validation with zero bare class attributes and zero paragraph-wrapped figure tags, passed Chromium EPUB XHTML browser review, passed the automated key-figure XHTML layout probe, opened in Apple Books without the earlier XML error banner, advanced to a figure page, and exposed the table of contents. It is covered by the final figure-artifact review. It has not received reader release approval.
non_claims: This candidate row does not approve curated reader EPUB for release.
This candidate row does not publish the ignored local EPUB artifact.
This candidate row does not promote any claim support state.

records.artifact_scope: Local ignored curated reader DOCX snapshot under build/curated_reader_edition/format_artifacts/docx/_reader_site/The-ASI-Stack.docx.
records.notes: The curated DOCX snapshot rendered locally, passed repaired-package relationship checks, converted through LibreOffice headless Writer with all pages raster-checked, passed the key-figure DOCX-to-PDF title-page layout probe, and is covered by the final figure-artifact review. A separate Apple textutil text fallback opened in Pages and exposed title/front-matter and chapter text, but that fallback has zero media entries and does not preserve the rich DOCX visual package. The DOCX application-evidence decision accepts the tracked local application-engine evidence for release preparation and clears only docx_application_review_not_completed. The rich DOCX has not received Word, LibreOffice GUI, Google Docs, manual document, or release approval.
non_claims: This candidate row does not approve curated reader DOCX for release.
This candidate row does not publish the ignored local DOCX artifact.
This candidate row does not treat the textutil fallback as rich DOCX approval.
This candidate row does not promote any claim support state.

records.artifact_scope: Local ignored curated reader PDF snapshot under build/curated_reader_edition/format_artifacts/pdf/_reader_site/The-ASI-Stack.pdf.
records.notes: The curated PDF snapshot rendered locally, passed all-page text and bounding-box extraction, all-page raster smoke testing, extracted-text reading-flow checks, page-by-page PDF release-preparation review, Chromium PDF viewer smoke review, key-figure caption-page layout review, and final figure-artifact review. It has not received release approval.
non_claims: This candidate row does not approve curated reader PDF for release.
This candidate row does not publish the ignored local PDF artifact.
This candidate row does not promote any claim support state.

records.artifact_scope: Dedicated e-reader or e-reader-application approval path for the current curated EPUB candidate.
records.notes: The current repaired curated EPUB digest was opened in macOS Apple Books after package repairs. Apple Books rendered chapter 1 without the earlier XML error banner, advanced to a figure page with caption and boundary text visible, and opened the table of contents. This clears the app/e-reader review blocker only; the curated reader edition still lacks release approval.
non_claims: This candidate row does not approve an e-reader artifact or e-reader experience for publication.
This candidate row does not publish the ignored local EPUB artifact.
This candidate row does not promote any claim support state.

records.artifact_scope: Audio-script preparation workspace and downstream MP3, M4B, and audio-embedded EPUB targets for the curated reader manuscript.
records.notes: The audio-script workspace has automated reading-flow and marker-order checks, and the script-level narration treatment review accepts the current script treatment for release preparation, clearing only narration_quality_review_not_completed. No pronunciation review, recorded-audio spot check, chapter timing, metadata review, MP3, M4B, audio-embedded EPUB, or audio release record exists.
non_claims: This candidate row does not approve audio, MP3, M4B, or audio-embedded EPUB artifacts.
This candidate row does not publish any audio artifact.
This candidate row does not promote any claim support state.
This candidate row does not approve pronunciation, recorded audio, timecoded markers, metadata, or an audiobook.

current_curated_candidate.release_boundary: The current curated candidate is not release-approved. It records automated preparation evidence, the Apple Books EPUB application review, the DOCX application-evidence decision, the accessibility-tree release-preparation probe, and the script-level audio narration treatment review, but it does not approve any curated HTML, EPUB, DOCX, PDF, e-reader, audio, or final figure artifact; future approval still requires an edition release record naming the exact reviewed artifact.

records.artifact_scope: Local ignored generated reader-site snapshot under build/reader_edition/format_artifacts/html/.
records.notes: The fresh local HTML snapshot rendered, passed structural inspection, passed full local browser artifact review across 118 page-view pairs covering all 59 generated reader HTML pages at desktop and mobile widths, and is named in `release_records/2026-06-29-v1-reader-html-855dc277.json` with digest f2b98bdb82c1c42cfe7d8bc85e63ce5ed06b45d29c8023d4948cd039599a4dfa.
non_claims: This row is not a release record; it points to the exact reader HTML release record.
This row does not approve EPUB, DOCX, PDF, e-reader, or audio artifacts.
This row does not promote any claim support state.

records.notes: The EPUB snapshot rendered, passed zip/navigation/content structural checks, carries OPF metadata title The ASI Stack, creator Corben Sorenson, and language en-US, and has sampled reader-note, evidence-boundary, and source-card XHTML entries recorded. It has not been opened and inspected in an e-reader application.
non_claims: This row is not a release record.
This row does not approve an EPUB artifact for publication.
This row does not promote any claim support state.

records.notes: The DOCX snapshot rendered, passed container, document XML, media, title, and compact evidence-boundary structural checks, then converted through the documents skill render_docx.py path via headless LibreOffice into a 514-page, 8,190,162-byte probe PDF. Representative pages 1, 25, 447, 472, 474, and 514 were visually sampled, including source-card appendix pages. This is not a full DOCX application review in Word, LibreOffice GUI, or Google Docs and does not approve the DOCX for publication.
non_claims: This row is not a release record.
This row does not approve a DOCX artifact for publication.
This row does not promote any claim support state.

records.artifact_scope: Local ignored UTF-8 PDF probe snapshot under build/reader_edition_pdf_probe_utf8/format_artifacts/pdf/_reader_site/The-ASI-Stack.pdf.
records.notes: The UTF-8 PDF probe rendered locally as a 535-page, 8,613,924-byte snapshot, local text extraction found the expected title, source-card, and evidence-boundary markers, and representative pages 1, 21, 25, 474, 497, 499, and 535 were visually sampled. Generated reader source now converts the wide Appendix G and Appendix H source tables into reader source cards before PDF rendering; no source-table collision was observed in the sampled source-card pages, but the full PDF has not received page-by-page layout review.
non_claims: This row is not a release record.
This row does not approve a PDF artifact for publication.
This row does not promote any claim support state.

release_rule: No reader HTML, EPUB, DOCX, PDF, e-reader conversion, audio, or audio-embedded EPUB artifact is release-approved until the relevant format row has no release blockers and an edition release record names the exact reviewed artifact.
non_claims: This matrix is a pre-release format-review ledger, not an edition release record.
This matrix does not publish reader artifacts and does not independently approve artifacts outside referenced edition release records.
This matrix does not promote any claim support state.
This matrix does not supersede the live AI/research book for claims, source boundaries, proof/test status, implementation horizons, or release records.
